products.name: The Burrow Tote
products.description: Heavyweight cotton canvas, screen-printed by hand with our den's own line art. Room for a laptop, a library book, and whatever else you're carrying today. "Born to Howl" — for the ones who mean it quietly.
products.material: 12oz brushed cotton canvas, reinforced stitched handles, interior flat bottom. Spot clean or gentle machine wash, lay flat to dry.
products.dimensions: 15.5" W x 16" H, 11" handle drop. Fits a 13–14" laptop and daily carry with room to spare.
